channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Anthropic Beats OpenAI on Secondary Markets With $1 Trillion Implied Valuation
item.description: On Forge Global, Anthropic shares are hovering around $1 trillion while OpenAI trades at $880 billion — a reversal nobody saw coming three months ago.

item.title: Spot ETH ETF inflows hit 10-day streak: Will Ether rally to $3K next?
item.description: Inflows to the spot Ether ETFs topped $633 million over the past 10-days, but are the flows significant enough to trigger a rally to $3,000?

item.title: Global crypto adoption slumps amid macro pressures, Turkey defies downtrend
item.description: Retail crypto activity fell 11% in Q1 as macro pressures weighed on markets, though Turkey and emerging economies showed resilience, TRM Labs data shows.

item.title: Google Maps Lets Filmmakers Scout Movie Scenes Using AI and Street View Data
item.description: Google unveiled a new AI tool in Maps that lets filmmakers preview scenes in real-world locations ahead (or instead) of scouting trips.

item.title: Aave rallies DeFi partners to contain fallout from $292 million KelpDAO hack
item.description: Industry players are coordinating a recovery effort as the year's biggest crypto theft rattled Aave, with Lido and EtherFi being firsts to offer aid.

item.title: Meta Will Lay Off 8,000 Employees as AI Focus Intensifies
item.description: Social media giant Meta is redirecting resources toward AI as CEO Mark Zuckerberg predicts the tech will continue to revolutionize work.

item.title: Anchorage Digital adds Marinade-powered staking strategies for Solana clients
item.description: The integration with Marinade Finance lets clients earn yield via validator selection strategies while retaining custody and control within a single platform.

item.title: Microsoft-Backed Space and Time Launches AI App Builder on Base
item.description: The no-code platform aims to make building and deploying on-chain apps as simple as writing a prompt.

item.title: Circle Economist Proposes 50% Rate Ceiling to Snap Aave's USDC Liquidity Crisis
item.description: Some users pushed back via Aave’s governance forum, fearing the changes would fuel liquidations on the lending protocol.

item.title: Tether freezes $344M USDt stablecoins at US law enforcement request
item.description: The stablecoin issuer cited "activity tied to unlawful conduct” but no further explanation for the freezing of the dollar-pegged tokens held in two wallet addresses.

item.title: Bitcoin enters disbelief phase as USDC exchange reserves push above $7.5B
item.description: A negative Bitcoin funding rate and $7.5 billion in USDC reserves suggest traders may start positioning against the bearish trend. Will BTC price keep rising?

item.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.5: Faster, Smarter—And Pricier
item.description: OpenAI's newest model matches GPT-5.4's speed while outperforming it on nearly every benchmark. It's rolling out to paid ChatGPT users today.

item.title: US Treasury Sanctions Powerful Cambodian Politician Allegedly Tied to Crypto Scam Network
item.description: Kok An, a Cambodian senator, is accused of running a massive crypto crime operation through his many resorts and casinos.

item.title: Inside the KelpDAO Bridge Exploit: How ~$292 Million in rsETH Was Released Against a Non-Existent Burn
item.description: TL;DR On April 18, 2026, attackers linked to North Korea’s Lazarus Group stole ~$292 million (116,500 rsETH) from KelpDAO’s LayerZero… The post Inside the KelpDAO Bridge Exploit: How ~$292 Million in rsETH Was Released Against a Non-Existe…

item.title: MoonPay launches fiat-to-stablecoin virtual accounts in New York
item.description: MoonPay has expanded its virtual accounts product to New York, allowing businesses to convert fiat into stablecoins and settle funds without prefunding across jurisdictions.

item.title: Inside the $71 million freeze on Arbitrum that has the crypto world questioning what decentralization really means
item.description: The emergency response prevented stolen funds from moving, but sparked debate over governance, control and the limits of decentralization on Layer 2s.

item.title: OpenAI Says Its New ChatGPT for Doctors Outperforms Humans in Clinical Tasks
item.description: ChatGPT for Clinicians is designed to save doctors time, and OpenAI says it scored higher than human physicians—on the AI giant's own test.

item.title: Tencent's New Hy3 AI Model Is the Most Efficient Chinese LLM No One's Talking About
item.description: Tencent just open-sourced Hy3 preview, a new model that punches above its weight on coding agents, reasoning, and search—built in under three months.

item.title: Crypto advocacy groups call action on market structure bill ‘critical‘
item.description: More than 120 entities associated with the crypto and blockchain industry signed onto a letter urging US Senators to move forward with a crypto market structure bill.

item.title: Fold Launches 'Bitcoin Bonus' Program for Employers Following Steak 'n Shake Debut
item.description: Publicly traded Bitcoin services firm Fold is rolling out a program to let companies grant employees bonuses in crypto.

item.title: Figure shares sink 9% as $1B lending milestone meets market volatility
item.description: FIGR stock retreated after a brief rally as shifting sentiment hits crypto-linked equities, even as analysts point to strong growth in the fintech's blockchain-based lending.

item.title: Ben Cowen: The Exact Date Bitcoin May Bottom in 2026 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9zV1N0bVVvX2xtY0lWMmE5M1d1SmNYQVJtWXNIX3RMcUU3ZWotWnFNUlE4UzZaOEdISzBJcHJ4ODJWWFU4d3BvUG82NWN1ZHJpWFVHejdoZ2Zzbnhzd0Zyc1NmSQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Ben Cowen: The Exact Date Bitcoi…

item.title: These 3 Ethereum metrics favor an ETH price rally to $6K
item.description: Ethereum signalled a potential rally to $6,000 as bullish technicals, tightening supply, and rising institutional demand are starting to look like major tailwinds.

item.title: The market repriced DeFi in just 48 hours
item.description: Di Bartolomeo argues that last weekend the market achieved – in real time – a notable feat that no regulator, auditor or commentator has ever done.

item.title: PUSD stablecoin deploys on ADI Chain, targeting $3T Islamic finance market
item.description: The Shariah-compliant stablecoin backed by Gulf currencies expands to a new Layer-2 network aimed at institutional settlement in the Middle East.

item.title: Founder of Solana Token Launchpad Believe Arrested on Assault, Strangulation Charges
item.description: Benjamin Pasternak faces criminal charges following an investor class action lawsuit and accusations of breaching an OTC token deal.

item.title: White House Accuses China of 'Industrial-Scale' Theft From American AI Models
item.description: President Trump's administration says foreign actors are using jailbreaking techniques and fake accounts to extract American AI capabilities.

item.title: Bitcoin weekly close in focus after BTC price fails to revisit $80K
item.description: Bitcoin brought its bull market support band as a key level for BTC price action to reclaim during the weekly candle close.

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried Withdraws Motion for New Trial, Denies Ghostwriting Allegations
item.description: The disgraced FTX founder's parents have reportedly pushed for a pardon from President Donald Trump behind closed doors.

item.title: Update on rsETH incident: rsETH reserves have been paused across Ethereum Core, Arbitrum, Base, Mantle, and Linea. This was done with the objective of recovering additional funds as the recovery plans progress. We will keep the community updated on t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTFB6ZFRGWkFMMXV4el80Mk1XYXJOUTlzY1lMdllLc2VTRWstTDNYZzFnbXkwcGpOWW40ZWRTT2R6ODBsM0djUFhjbUJNbjNZV2UtcUFDQ1owdjU?oc=5" target="_blank">Update on rsETH incident: rsETH reserves have b…

item.title: Spain seizes crypto cold wallets in illegal manga piracy raid
item.description: Spanish police seized crypto cold wallets tied to an alleged illegal manga site, as questions remain over whether officers can access the funds.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: AI Agents Using Crypto
item.description: AI agents are executing transactions, forming “agentic finance.” Crypto is the financial backend for these autonomous systems. Learn use cases, risks, and what experts say.

item.title: French Weather Agency Alerts Police to Sensor ‘Interference’ After $35K Polymarket Payouts
item.description: Long-shot bets on a market tied to the daily maximum temperature in Paris have raised eyebrows—and triggered a police complaint.

item.title: Tether freezes $344 million in USDT on Tron tied to 'illicit activity'
item.description: The stablecoin issuer said the action followed U.S. law enforcement requests as global watchdog FATF warned of growing role of digital dollars in illicit money flows.

item.title: Tether Freezes $344 Million in USDT Stablecoins Flagged for Illicit Activity
item.description: Stablecoin issuer Tether said it coordinated with U.S. authorities to implement one of its largest asset freezes on record.

item.title: JPMorgan says persistent security flaws curb DeFi’s institutional appeal
item.description: A $20 billion hit from the KelpDAO exploit highlights systemic risks, while flat ETH-denominated growth and a shift to stablecoins point to ongoing fragility in DeFi.

item.title: BIS warns cryptocurrency exchanges are becoming ‘shadow banks,’ and why that's a risk
item.description: The Bank for International Settlements (BIS) released a report warning stablecoin yields and other DeFi “earn” products are bank-like services without the safeguards or insurance.

item.title: FTX estate misses out on $3B Cursor stake value after $200K sale in 2023
item.description: The FTX estate sold its Cursor stake for $200K in 2023, now worth $3B after a SpaceX-linked valuation surge, raising questions about bankruptcy asset sales.

item.title: Proposed House Bill Would Require Warrants for Government AI Surveillance
item.description: Reps. Thomas Massie and Lauren Boebert introduced the Surveillance Accountability Act, targeting legal loopholes that allow warrantless access to Americans' data.

item.title: Insane chart showing the evolution of crypto ETFs from @Todd_Sohn. Spaghetti cannon in effect. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE12bi1iczhfdzB3WFFqaXQyd29vUXJJUnFnYU9pdzhOeFVtWkJuLVh3NnlzR1hoRW4zZXFzdjlnc0pQUm9PVUVESk5EcVA4SWpqNmtJaDJTd2RHRXU0cTdNcmVvNTU?oc=5" target="_blank">Insane chart showing the evolut…

item.title: OKX accelerates US push with BitGo off-exchange settlement
item.description: OKX integrates BitGo off-exchange settlement for US institutions, reducing pre-funding requirements and marking a key step in its US expansion following ICE investment.

item.title: The $145 billion math: Why bitcoin’s quantum threat is manageable, not existential
item.description: Quantum fears focus on vulnerable early wallets, but market data suggests even a worst case sell-off would be large, not catastrophic.

item.title: Ripple-linked XRP slips amid bitcoin profit-taking, ETF delay
item.description: Token falls 2.5% after rejection near $1.44 as leveraged ETF launch pushback adds to mixed sentiment.

item.title: Google Takes Aim at Nvidia With New Tensor Chips to Power AI Boom
item.description: Google’s new processors target massive model training and the emerging AI agent economy, offering distinct builds for both needs.

item.title: Kelp DAO exploiter launders nearly all 75,700 in stolen ETH through THORchain
item.description: The wallet linked to the Kelp DAO exploit appears to have laundered most of the $175 million worth of stolen Ether, while another $71 million remains frozen by Arbitrum’s security council.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) drops 3.9%, leading index lower
item.description: Ethereum (ETH), down 2.9% since Wednesday, was also an underperformer.

item.title: More than 90% of Web3 games failed after $15 billion boom as gamers never showed up: Caladan
item.description: Gaming took 63% of all Web3 venture funding in 2022, but by 2025 its share had fallen to single digits as capital rotated into AI, real-world assets and layer-2 infrastructure.

item.title: 'Excellent Window' for Strategic Accumulation as Bitcoin Risk Indicator Flips Bullish
item.description: With Bitcoin topping $79K Wednesday, a "cleared risk landscape" hints at a potential extension of its ongoing rally.

item.title: Andre Cronje’s Flying Tulip adds withdrawal circuit breaker as DeFi exploits mount
item.description: Flying Tulip said its withdrawal safeguard is designed to fail open, while a status page lets users monitor the system in real time.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Clears $79,000, Then Reverses
item.description: Justin Sun is suing Trump’s World Liberty Financial, and the U.S. government is now openly running a Bitcoin node.

item.title: BlackRock drives 7-day Bitcoin ETF inflow streak as BTC nears $80,000
item.description: US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a seven-day inflow streak totaling $1.9 billion, surpassing their March run over a similar period.

item.title: $30 Billion and Counting: How Tokenized RWAs Are Becoming a Mainstream Investment for Institutional Capital
item.description: This blog is a preview of our forthcoming report, “The New Rails: How Digital Assets Are Reshaping the Foundations of… The post $30 Billion and Counting: How Tokenized RWAs Are Becoming a Mainstream Investment for Institutional Capital app…

item.title: Anthropic Using ‘Fear-Based Marketing’ to Promote Claude Mythos: Sam Altman
item.description: The OpenAI chief said warnings about rival Anthropic’s AI model may be exaggerated, as its cybersecurity capabilities draw scrutiny.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs flows are (to quote Steve Winwood) back in the high life.. every single rolling period for we track is now positive, haven't seen that in months (IBIT's $3b is in Top 1% of all ETFs). Still tho, need a couple bil more to get back to breaking new ground i - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1KVmRPcFBYNVdzbGpLamJDY3U5b20tdXM0eE5pb3FuX1FKWmxjR2k4bmQ1UDlKSmUxdTVGWHBJY2tfaHl0N2hDd0hGZGxpczZrV3VIaXFqMjgwT1FFczBRQ3E4N00?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin ETFs flows are (to quot…

item.title: U.S. military runs Bitcoin node, sees crypto as power projection versus China
item.description: Admiral Samuel Paparo, head of US Indo-Pacific Command, told two congressional panels this week that the military is running a live Bitcoin node for cybersecurity testing and views the protocol as a tool of national power in competition wi…

item.title: MetaMask co-founder Dan Finlay leaves Consensys after 10 years
item.description: MetaMask co-founder Dan Finlay is stepping down from ConsenSys citing burnout, as long-time crypto figures such as Bitcoin advocate Preston Pysh also pull back from public roles.

item.title: Eric Trump, Michael Saylor, and Anatoly Yakovenko headline Consensus Miami 2026 as crypto's biggest stage returns
item.description: The industry's premier festival will host 20,000 attendees, merging heavy-hitting traditional finance integration with unmatched Miami nightlife.

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried withdraws retrial motion. He believes he would not get a fair trial.
item.description: The founder of the collapsed crypto exchange FTX said he might file for a retrial after a decision on his appeal is ruled upon.

item.title: Bitcoin buyers show ‘renewed conviction’ with BTC price push toward $79K
item.description: Bitcoin reached multi-month highs at $79,000 as bulls regained control and exchange reserves tightened, signaling buyers returning and reduced sell pressure.

item.title: Bitcoin's bullish momentum runs into Pentagon-backed inflation warning
item.description: What you need to know for April 23, 2026
